name: IT Glue
description: IT Glue is a documentation platform designed for managed service providers (MSPs) and IT departments to store and organize IT documentation

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to IT Glue as an Administrator
2. Go to Account > Settings > API Keys
3. Generate a new API key (store it safely - it cannot be viewed again)
4. Select your region (check your IT Glue login URL)
5. Enter the API key and select your region below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your IT Glue API key. Go to Account > Settings > API Keys to generate one.

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Select the region where your IT Glue account is hosted

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verify access to users in IT Glue

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Verify access to configurations and assets in IT Glue
